reviews.title: Great watch, much better than my old "smart" watch
reviews.text:
I got Moto 360 several years ago when smart watches first came out and it was nice, but annoying. It was tied into everything and kept giving me alerts and so eventually I got tired of it. My wife also had a first generation Samsung Gear watch and that was about the same as the Moto.
Well, fast forward a few years and now my wife, daughter, son and daughter-in-law all have newer smart watches (Apple Watches and Fitbit) and they all love them. It was time to get a new phone, so I got a Samsung S20 FE and then decided to get the Samsung watch. I saw on the reviews that it really works well with Samsung phones and so I decided to get the Watch 3. I was looking at the Watch 2, which had a few less features and then I found the Watch 3 in the 41mm size and then found a refurbished one so I ended up paying about the same for the Watch 3 as I would have for the Watch 2.
I'm very impressed with the watch and really love it. I didn't get the one with a cell phone, it just connects to my phone with bluetooth and/or wifi, but it's really amazing. I get my messages, and can turn off the ones that I don't want and then I also get all the health apps. So, now it tells me to get off my chair and walk around and does EKG and stress tesing and Oxygen levels..
I was concerned that the 41 mm might be too small, but it is a great size for me as you can see from the pic. I have had a Citizen Echo Drive for more than 10 years and it is a little larger, but I like the size of the Watch 3 better.
If you are thinking about getting a watch, this one is a good deal right now and I believe it does work best if you use it with a Samsung phone.

reviews.title: Love the watch, hate the battery.
reviews.text: I don't use the sleep tracking because the watch is bulky and annoying while trying to sleep. The mobile app is ok, constantly running in background.  The battery life sucks, only good for a day and sometimes a day and a half which is to bad because I do love all the things it does. I think I can answer my phone on my watch (still figuring out how) can definitely hang up on unwanted calls and can read messages.  Good pedometer and workout tool. Overall nice watch with crappy battery life.

reviews.title: Poor Measurements - Support Cannot Help
reviews.text:
After charging for 30 minutes as instructed, I paired the smart watch with the app. This was easy, and the one reason I gave it 2 stars instead of 1. The other reason for 2 stars, the interface was easier to use than I expected.

But if the measurements are not accurate, ease of use doesn't matter.

I bought this smart watch to track my heart rate while exercising—mainly walking. After recent heart procedures, my doctor wants me to keep my pulse below a certain rate. Each time I measure, the pulse differs substantially from the pulse oximeter that always agrees with my doctor's office pulse oximeter, and heart monitor. It goes as high as 90 when the PO says 52. I took multiple measurements, including taking my own pulse. The closest measurements were 60 when the actual rate was 51 or 52.

Support is through a chat on the app. I did not wait long for support, however they did not try to help me. They insisted that the heart rate changes. That I had to let it sync with the app. Not once did they address the possibility that the smart watch might be reading the rate wrong. Told me to try again after I had already tried multiple times.

Focusing on anything but the issue I am reporting does not help me. Even suggesting I exercise and measure my heart rate. Telling me the human heart rate is constantly changing. Literally, answers like they were talking to a small child.

I had high hopes for this device. It disappointed on two levels - Heart Rate, Support. I cannot recommend. Look for a different smart watch if you need accurate heart rate measurements.

reviews.title: NOT AS DESCRIBED AT ALL
reviews.text: I carefully read all reviews before purchasing this smart watch but was so disappointed. It would not hold preferences & kept defaulting to kg & cm. Would not toggle from one thing to another on app. Had to go all the way out of app & go back in before it would toggle from steps to profile to anything else. Sometimes I'd get my cell to ring on my watch, never could answer it or text back from the watch. I'd rather pay the extra & get an apple watch that actually works. I can't tell you how many times I set the preferences & saved them only to find it defaulted right back the next day.  One of the sorriest watches I've ever owned & I kept it 2 weeks before returning it really trying to make it work.

reviews.title: Better than name brand. Long battery life!!
reviews.text: I will take this watch over a fit bit any day! In fact my husband bought me a fit bit and I returned it because thus watch is soooo much better. What I like most is the BATTERY LIFE IS AMAZING! I bought it weeks ago and have only charged it twice.

reviews.title: Never dies
reviews.text: This thing is great.  Does everything you would expect and the battery lasts FOREVER!!  Great smartwatch.

reviews.title: Sleep function is worthless
reviews.text: I really like this watch, has everything I wanted and everything works with one exception:  the sleep analysis feature is worthless.  It only records sleep between 10:00 pm and 8:00 am and if you move or get up it screws up everything. Good customer service, they really try to help, but they will tell you if you get up to go to the bathroom, watch begins recording all over again. Too bad!

features: HEALTH AND FITNESS TRACKER: The iTouch Explorer 3 smartwatch has a built-in pedometer and a heart rate monitor that automatically tracks your steps, calories burned, cardiovascular activity and sleep. With up to 7 days of battery life!

BONUS FEATURES: Receive notifications for calls, texts, and social media. Daily weather and the 7-day forecast on your wrist. Turn your Explorer 3 into a shutter button with Camera Remote. RUGGED DESIGN: The iTouch Explorer 3 is IP68-rated water resistant with a durable glass screen and a metal bezel to protect your device through general wear and tear. Battery working time: about 7-10 days; Standby time: 30 days.

SPORT MODES: Add another dimension to your fitness with Sports Mode. Choose from a variety of options. Activate to track steps, distance, and calories. Workouts automatically sync with the mobile app so you can look back at your entire history.

FITNESS GOALS: Stay motivated by setting goals in the iTouch Wearables app for steps, calories burned, sleep, water intake, weight and more. Check the app to see all your completed goals. LARGE WATCHFACE LIBRARY: Choose from built-in watch faces, create your own or access the LARGE watch face library in our mobile app! reviews.title: My Approach S6 -- Near Perfection!
reviews.text: Very pleased with the quality of this band replacement for my Approach S6 band and the ease of installation. Having a buddy helps, but the installation is easily accomplished on your own within a matter of minutes.  The new band is more flexible than the original which, IMHO, is a plus.  What I can't say is that the original band might have stiffened with age.  Who knows and it doesn't matter.  The screwdrivers are also an awesome design -- the handle ends have a hex shape you can stick in your drill if your hands are weak.  The only minuscule minus is that the retainer bar/strap is a tad large as others have stated, but problem solved by reusing the retainer strap from the original band. VERY pleased with this purchase.

title: Apple Watch Series 8 [GPS + Cellular 41mm] Smart Watch w/Graphite Stainless Steel Case w/Midnight Sport Band-S/M. Fitness Tracker, Blood Oxygen & ECG Apps, Always-On Retina Display, Water Resistant
features: WHY APPLE WATCH SERIES 8 — Your essential companion for a healthy life is now even more powerful. Advanced sensors provide insights to help you better understand your health. New safety features can get you help when you need it. The bright, Always-On Retina display is easy to read, even when your wrist is down.

CELLULAR CONNECTIVITY — Send a text, make a call, and stream music without your iPhone, even while traveling internationally. Use Family Setup to manage Apple Watch for family members who don’t have an iPhone.
EASILY CUSTOMIZABLE — Available in a range of sizes and materials, with dozens of bands to choose from and watch faces with complications tailored to whatever you’re into.

INNOVATIVE SAFETY FEATURES — Crash Detection and Fall Detection can automatically connect you with emergency services in the event of a severe car crash or a hard fall. And Emergency SOS provides urgent assistance with the press of a button.

ADVANCED HEALTH FEATURES — Temperature sensing is a breakthrough feature that provides deep insights into women’s health. Keep an eye on your blood oxygen. Take an ECG anytime. Get notifications if you have an irregular rhythm. And see how much time you spent in REM, Core, or Deep sleep with Sleep Stages.

SIMPLY COMPATIBLE — It works seamlessly with your Apple devices and services. Unlock your Mac automatically. Find your devices with a tap. Pay and send money with Apple Pay. Apple Watch requires an iPhone 8 or later with the latest iOS version.
INCREDIBLE DURABILITY — Tougher than tough. It’s crack resistant, IP6X-certified dust resistant, and swimproof with WR50 water resistance.

A POWERFUL FITNESS PARTNER — The enhanced Workout app gives you new ways to train, and advanced metrics for more information about your workout performance. And Apple Watch comes with three months of Apple Fitness+ free.
APPS ON YOUR WRIST — With access to tens of thousands of apps on the App Store right on your wrist, Apple Watch is the perfect personal device for whatever you love to do.
LEGAL DISCLAIMERS — This is a summary of the main product features. See below to learn more.

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.text:
Pretty good smartwatch. I needed something to replace my Galaxy Active, but didn't want to spend $100+ on something with a horrible battery life. I bought this one and for a while I was disappointed. I had to charge the watch each night and the steps weren't as accurate. I changed the setting so that the screen doesn't turn on when you move your wrist and that has saved the battery big time. I'm on day 4 and only down to 50% which means I'm now able to track sleep as well. I still think the steps aren't as accurate because it almost matches the steps in my phone's health app, but I'm notorious for leaving my phone places. I also miss being able to limit the options for exercise types in the watch face. I have to scroll through a long list each time. Overall, pretty good product for a cheaper price.

Update: I originally gave this 5 stars, but I have to take 2 away. A few days ago, the watch all of a sudden stopped counting steps. For the price, it was perfect until it stopped working. Back to the drawing board.

reviews.title: works to add security to fitbit watch band
reviews.text:
Good. I have been using these bands as extra security on my fitbit bands since I first got a fitbit dating back to 2015. I have had several styles since then, and I always make sure to have a pack of these security bands on hand. First it was because the fitbit band was just a pressure close band that easily popped off, then it was a matter of keeping a regular watch band style extra secure. These work on the regular width bands.

When I was ready to buy more of these security bands, I was about to buy some that are made for fitbit, but then I realized that those have a protrusion for locking into the band. I really just wanted something to slip on with no need to make use of the band holes to secure it. These are exactly what I wanted. Nice variety of colors.

New Design: Unique sport silicone slim Fitbit Versa 2 bands, with greater flexibility and narrower width, soft & comfortable. Not only thin, but also a chic look. It looks more fashionable and decent, which make the wrist looks slimmer and move more freely, a better choice of any occasions like sport, travel, work, party for women, men, ladies, girls and youth. 4. Easy to Clean: No matter how sweaty this band got, just remove it from the watch and give it a quick rinse, dry it with a lint-free cloth. It will be clean again.
Warranty:
100% Satisfaction Guarantee. If you received defective products or had any problems, please feel free to message us. We take care of you with free replacement or full refund immediately.

reviews.title: Good band

title: LCW Smart Watch for iPhone Android, Fitness Tracker Health Watch w/Heart Rate Blood Oxygen Monitor, Body Temperature, 1.4" Touch Screen Smartwatch, Sleep Step Tracker, IP67 Waterproof
description:
Multifunctional Fitness tracker with Color screen
This multifunctional fitness tracker with 0.96-inch color LCD screen, 24 hours dynamic heart rate monitor and blood pressure monitor, sleep monitor,calls and message smart reminder, pedometer, search phone, calorie counter, alarm alert, sedentary reminder, remote camera control, GPS Tracking, etc...
Heart Rate Monitor
24 Dynamic Hours Heart Rate Monitor (Continuous and Automatic), you can view your daily or historical heart rate curve.You can find your own pulse, comfortably on the wrist. Every measurement counts will lets your pulse become your health guide.
Intelligent reminder
Keep it connected with your smartphone via Bluetooth to a range of 10 meters, you can use this smart watch to automatic monitor sleep, sedentary reminder, it will vibrate to remind you if your phone receives a phone call, SMS text messages and SNS messages like Facebook , Twitter, WhatsApp
GPS sport tracking
GPS running connected to the GPS Tracker to show the route in the application. Track your movement all the time through the gaps connected to your phone during running mode to get real-time statistics such as pace and distance on the track. Open the GPS function on your phone and place the GPS tracking in the APPLICATION, then you can see your athletic track and share it on Twitter or Facebook, etc.
Simple charge, Long Standby
The fitness tracker built-in USB plug,simply connect it to any universal power adapter, PC or power bank without requiring a particular adapter, one single charge(about 1-2 hours) gives you up to 5-7 days of working time.
Tips:
1. This fitness tracker uses a USB charging cable to charge and the standby time is usually 5-7 days. 2.The sleep monitor function will activate automatically in night time. Please wear it when sleep,generallywaking up display after 10-30 minutes.
features: 【Multifunctional Smart Watch】24 hours dynamic heart rate monitor and blood pressure monitor, sleep monitor helping you adjust yourself for a healthier lifestyle, calls and message smart reminder, Calorie Counter, pedometer, search phone, sedentary reminder, remote camera control, GPS Tracking etc...
【Blood Pressure Monitor】Smart blood pressure monitor measure your Systolic, Diastolic blood pressure every moment you want, sync record on app by date.

【GPS Sports Tracking 】 Running watch connected GPS tracker to show the route in the app. Track your movement all the time via connected gaps on your phone during run mode to get real time stats like pace and distance on the track.Pairing your bracelet with APP improves your training efficiency.
【See Calls & Messages on Your Wrist】Receive call, calendar, SMS and SNS (Facebook, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, Instagram, and Twitter) notifications on display; never miss the messages that matter.

【Long Standby】The fitness tracker built-in USB plug, simply connect it to any USB block, PC or power bank without requiring a particular adapter, one single charge(about 1-2 hours) gives you up to 5-7 days of working time.
